items.label: Core Idea
items.subtitle: A physics-driven fruit merge game where dropping identical fruits triggers cascading chain reactions for escalating scores.

items.label: Gameplay
items.subtitle: Drop fruits into a jar, let physics trigger merges between identical tiers, chase chain reactions for high scores.

items.label: Mechanics
items.subtitle: Circle physics, tier-based merging, weighted spawning, and container pressure create emergent chain reactions.

items.label: Game Feel
items.subtitle: Squishy, warm, alive — every merge is a tiny gift that pulls you into one more run.
